front.title: Precise Priority-based Flow Control Notification with RoCEv2

abstract.t: This document defines a format for Precise Priority-based Flow Control (PPFC) notifications within RoCEv2 (RDMA over Converged Ethernet version 2) networks. The proposed format enables network devices experiencing congestion to generate explicit congestion signals that can be efficiently carried back to the source clients. This facilitates fast, fine-grained flow control, complementing traditional end-to-end congestion control and improving performance in high-throughput, low-latency environments.
